title: eMaps - Bing Maps invalid credentials
excerpt: Has anyone used eMaps? I’m testing the route planning but I can’t go any further it keeps coming up with an error message “The specified credentials are invalid. You can sign up for a free developer account at http://www…

posts.author: vgmonday (Verena)
posts.cookedHtml: Has anyone used eMaps? I’m testing the route planning but I can’t go any further it keeps coming up with an error message “The specified credentials are invalid. You can sign up for a free developer account at http://www.bingmapsportal.com”. I have added the eMaps as a widget in my board view. Is there a setting that I may have missed?

posts.author: Krunchy (Guillaume Servonnat)
posts.cookedHtml:
I haven’t been able to go that far with this app, just keep loading after installing…,
I’m not sure this app is even working, so I’m curious of other’s experience!

posts.author: sorensonsolutions (Sarah)
posts.cookedHtml: Yeah, does the same for me. Infinite loading page.

posts.author: sorensonsolutions (Sarah)
posts.cookedHtml: Hopefully @monday will audit the eMaps widget, because it’s the worst! Infinite loading page, doesn’t even let me make an account.

posts.author: vgmonday (Verena)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Sarah,

Have you tried this video tutorial? monday.com: Apps Marketplace, https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Z8-vWBvdekk

Regards.
